item.title: tRNA
item.description: 一些尚有记录的、未被销毁的 Anyway,fog faded.The road ahead is magnanimous. 11/18/2025 Every rendezvous leads to parting;honor every encounter. 11/25/2025。

item.title: About SINOPHARM
item.description:
#关于Sinopharm的岗位分析，有于主观判断的原因，将各分析者思考过程分为以下几个部分： ①主观分析、②被动分析、③客观分析
##分析结果：https://pan.quark.cn/s/6a8cd08f7ee2
###DeepSeek+： ①https://chat.deepseek.com/share/xic0zaosntlvo80wja ②https://chat.deepseek.com/share/iqan5r1iz5pa6wziys ③https://chat.deepseek.com/share/1vttb32fj6bs4hqobr
###ChatGPT+： ①https://chatgpt.com/share/6969ea3a-d958-8006-a17d-c7754f1b9a5c ②https://chatgpt.com/share/69804656-98b4-8006-9e79-7c753c3a61b0 ③https://chatgpt.com/share/69804674-1218-8006-8e78-98edd853da8b。

item.title: The new page
item.description: After struggling, I didn't get my account back. So I started a new blog. —20260201。
